description: Value for money, the lotto Stadio firm ground football boot is a great footwear for beginners. Replete with water repellent and impact protection features, the Stadio allows your feet to flex perfectly, offering great elastic return of energy.Upper Water-repellent premium plus upper to keep your boots in best possible shape Velcro straps on the centre for extended durability and snug Fit Cushioned collar and padded tongue for added comfort and snug fit Midsole EVA injected midsole for lightweight comfort and enhanced shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole lined in multi-directional pattern for flexible movement and superior grip of the foot Pivot points below the big toe mound for flexible 180 degree movement of the forefoot shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
